videos.headline: John Copenhaver hauls in nice grab for UNC TD
videos.description: North Carolina scores again with a nice throw from Drake Maye to John Copenhaver.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (John Copenhaver hauls in nice grab for UNC TD) 2023/09/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Omarion Hampton plows through end zone for TD
videos.description: Omarion Hampton scores the first touchdown of the night for North Carolina.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Omarion Hampton plows through end zone for TD) 2023/09/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Dakereon Joyner brings South Carolina level with TD
videos.description: Dakereon Joyner runs up the middle of the field untouched for the Gamecocks touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dakereon Joyner brings South Carolina level with TD) 2023/09/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Juju McDowell gives South Carolina the lead with TD
videos.description: Juju McDowell's touchdown gives the Gamecocks the 14-10 lead in the second quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Juju McDowell gives South Carolina the lead with TD) 2023/09/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Drake Maye connects with Kobe Paysour for TD
videos.description: North Carolina takes the lead over South Carolina with a perfect pass from Drake Maye to Kobe Paysour.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Drake Maye connects with Kobe Paysour for TD) 2023/09/02 ESHEET
